chapters.title: Chapter 704 - Ancient Lands
chapters.body:
Chapter 704 - Ancient Lands

Chapter 704: Ancient Lands

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation

Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Crow Soul Valley, which was covered in deathly stillness previously, suddenly began to show signs of life. It was the first time since in several years.

Creek waterfalls which had stopped previously began to flow quickly, and the bleak and desolate houses recovered their original appearance.

The dead trees and withered grass were once again luxurious, while the broken suspension bridge returned to its former appearance as well.

Everything suddenly recovered from their desolate looks. The entire Crow Soul Valley returned to the past times, and the entrance to the Ancient Lands was opened again!

When Li Yunmu saw it, he was extremely excited. All the clansmen of Crow Soul Valley were also resurrected because of Miss An's actions.

Apart from her mother whose consciousness had been absorbed by her, everyone else returned to life. Of course, that didn't include the spirit which had been scattered and dispersed by Li Yunmu.

When Miss An looked at the once again beautiful Crow Soul Valley, she couldn't help but say with strong emotion in her voice, "So… this is my home!"

Li Yunmu had reached the doors to the Ancient Lands by then. "Many thanks to you! Now I can save the people of my homeland. You… aren't going to come together with me?" he asked her.

Miss An shook her head and said, "I have returned home. Henceforth, I will stay here and complete my mother's desire in her place and gradually re-organize Crow Soul Valley."

When Li Yunmu saw Miss An, he felt that there seemed to be another woman standing beside her and that woman was smiling amiably.

"Then take care of yourself," he said with a nod.

When faced with Li Yunmu's departing figure, Miss An felt reluctant to part with him for some reason and hurriedly called out to him. "Li Yunmu!"

He stopped in his tracks and couldn't help but suspiciously look at Miss An behind him. Her eyes were full of tears.

That girl, what was she up to?

"I hope that you will return alive," Miss An said emotionally while waving her hand.

There was a chance that it was their last meeting. It might b their first and last farewell.

At that moment, many people suddenly appeared around Miss An. They were the clansmen of Crow Soul Valley who had come to send off Li Yunmu. They were all very grateful to him for helping to resurrect their clan chief and them.

Li Yunmu nodded at Miss An and walked towards the exit of Crow Soul Valley without the slightest hesitation. The entrance to the Ancient Lands was right before him.

He had come from distant lands to find it, and right then, his wish was about to finally come true.

After he entered the rotating door, he reached a desolate primordial world. He had never expected that the so-called Ancient Lands would surprisingly resemble the world when it had just begun.

Still, it was the place where gods existed, so how could it be so desolate?

There were surprisingly ten huge suns in the sky, and they constantly roasted the whole earth. No wonder then that the region before Li Yunmu was barren and without any sign of life!

Li Yunmu took out his bow and the power in his body formed arrows. Three of them instantly appeared in his hand.

"Three-part Origin Arrow!"

The three arrows flew upwards, and three of the suns were instantly shot down. The other seven, however, were still in the sky, heating the world into an inferno.

Li Yunmu pulled his bow once more and shot at three suns overhead. They also fell down the next moment.

He then shot three more, but when he pulled out the final arrow, the sun above his head spoke up. "Noble warrior, I request you to let me off! I am the only remaining scion, and still need to illuminate the human world!"

Li Yunmu put away his bow and arrow since a sun was somewhat important for the human world. He hadn't expected to turn into Hou Yi in the Ancient Lands.

He couldn't help but shake his head.

Suddenly two gods appeared on the horizon, busy fighting each other. Li Yunmu wanted to enquire about the ancient secret method, and the two gods could be a great source of information for him.

In the sky, the two gods were constantly trading blows. "If it were not for you, would Crow Soul Valley have become so bleak?"

"If it were not for you, would I have been able to go to the Buzhou Mountain?"

Fire God Zhurong and River God Gonggong were constantly quarrelling. The entire sky had changed color, since water and fire were incompatible. The powers of the two people filled the whole primordial world with fire and water!

Li Yunmu chose that moment to interrupt them. "You two don't need to fight anymore. Crow Soul Valley had recovered its original appearance. I just entered the Ancient Lands through there."

For the past several hundred years, no mortal had entered the Ancient Lands through Crow Soul Valley. Upon seeing one, a hint of alertness appeared in the eyes of Fire God Zhurong and River God Gonggong.

"Who are you?" Zhurong asked with a sneer. Based on Li Yunmu's appearance, he should be a mortal, but how could a mortal enter the Ancient Lands?

"Mortal, I advise you that you quickly leave this place! This is not a place where you can come!" Zhurong said coldly.

Li Yunmu cupped his fist and said, "I am very sorry to disturb you two gods. My clansmen encountered an enormous crisis, and I have come here to ask for the ancient secret method to save them."

When the two gods heard the words 'ancient secret method', their complexion changed instantly.

Gonggong suddenly moved to subdue Li Yunmu, and Zhurong said with his eyes wide open, "You are too brazen, mortal! You surprisingly intend to get your hands on the treasure of the Ancient Lands, the ancient secret method!"

Li Yunmu was slightly startled and moved his hands to protect himself from Gonggong while frowning. "Two respectable gods, this matter concerns the life and death of my clansmen. I hope that you both can assist me. I want the ancient secret method only to save my clansmen."

River God Gonggong and Fire God Zhurong didn't care about Li Yunmu's aim at all. As long as he had designs on the ancient secret method, he had to be taken to the divine world to be interrogated properly.

"Follow us! If you have anything to say, then say it to Fuxi!"

"Fuxi?"

Li Yunmu was somewhat startled. How important was the ancient secret method to them? It did not seem like the two gods had any intention to tell him about it.

Since Li Yunmu could meet Fuxi, he did not consider fleeing. Perhaps Fuxi would know where exactly was the ancient secret method?

Li Yunmu didn't resist and was carried away by Fire God Zhurong and River God Gonggong.

The divine world of the Ancient Lands was also known as Primordial God World. It was the dwelling of gods of the eastern domain. Although Li Yunmu didn't know how many ancient gods had awakened, he was certain that all the gods of the eastern domain resided there.

chapters.title: Chapter 710 - The Price
chapters.body:
Chapter 710 - The Price

Chapter 710: The Price

With the approval of Fuxi and Nuwa, the grand marriage of Li Yunmu and Yuan Biyao was held in the Primordial God World. Apart from Xingtian, all the other gods were present.

But marriage in the Ancient Lands was slightly different compared to the Land of Ice.

The event was very simple. There was a banquet, and the marriage with Yuan Biyao could be considered as complete.

When Li Yunmu wanted to take her out of the Primordial God World, Nuwa unexpectedly blocked his path.

“Mortal, if you are able to successfully rescue your clansmen, don’t forget today’s kindness!” Fuxi said.

Li Yunmu knew his words weren’t simple and couldn’t help but say, “If there’s something to be said then please speak directly! Don’t beat around the bush.”

Fuxi burst out laughing. “Mortal, you really are a straightforward person, then I will speak directly! I hope that the next time you come to the Ancient Lands, you will get rid of the seal. Our war god Xingtian’s battle with the black qilin still hasn’t concluded. You have the true god inside your body, so you will certainly be able to find a way to do it.”

Li Yunmu cupped his fist and said, “Alright! If I am able to successfully rescue my clansmen, I will certainly return to the Primordial God World to help you get rid of the seal.”

After that, Li Yunmu left the Primordial God World with Yuan Biyao. It was her first time outside, so she was like a curious child who had left home.

“Biyao, since you agreed to come and rescue my clansmen, I will definitely treat you well,” Li Yunmu said calmly.

Yuan Biyao nodded and said with a slight smile, “I believe you.”

The system couldn’t help but sigh. [Everyone says that women are both foolish and easily infatuated, and sure enough they are!]

Li Yunmu was slightly startled and hurriedly asked, “What do you mean by this?”

[I am talking about combining the ancient secret method with your Great Devouring Technique. If you do it, you can use your world to devour other planes. But in the future, only an illusion of the ancient secret method will be left behind.

[You used all sorts of methods to bring her out of the Primordial God World with you, but she cannot coexist with you. Don’t you see the irony here? She believed you, unknowing that you were only using her.]

When Li Yunmu heard the system’s words, a loud bang rang out in his head. He hadn’t thought of exploiting Yuan Biyao. He had only been listening to the system and following its commands. Previously, whenever thorny people appeared in front of him, the system had helped him to deal with them.

Yet right then, the system told him something which was completely different from his imagination. How could he not be completely astonished?

“Did you do it deliberately? Why didn’t you tell me before?”

[If I told you, could it be that you would have forgotten about saving your plane?]

The system’s words left Li Yunmu speechless. He had many precious things on Earth, but Yuan Biyao also wasn’t someone whom he wanted to abandon. It left him with an impossibly difficult choice.

[Right now, there are two choices in front of you: either sacrifice the woman and rescue your world, or run far away with her and wait for the 66 parallel planes to merge. Everything on Earth will turn to ashes. Your friends, brothers, parents and everything else which you care about will vanish in a puff of smoke!]

After the system finished speaking, Li Yunmu shouted loudly at it. “Enough! Don’t speak anymore!”

Mistakenly, he spoke those words aloud and startled Yuan Biyao, who was standing by his side, immersed in happiness.

“You… What’s up with you?” she asked.

Li Yunmu was distracted and hurriedly said, “Nothing… Biyao, I…”

Seeing Li Yunmu stammer, Yuan Biyao smiled at him. “Aren’t you happy that you can rescue your clansmen now? Why do you look so sad?”

Li Yunmu extended his hand and gently stroked her cheek. He wished he could become the sacrifice himself. He hadn’t thought that he would have to sacrifice Yuan Biyao, whom he had just married, to save his people.

Li Yunmu tightly clenched his fists, feeling extremely nervous.

His actions were completely baffling to Yuan Biyao. The Li Yunmu she knew was completely different from the person in front of her right then. He should be very happy, unlike the person before her who was obviously distressed.

Yuan Biyao touched Li Yunmu’s cheek with the back of her hand and said with a smile, “If you have something in your heart, then tell me. I am already your wife.”

After seeing Yuan Biyao’s understanding gaze, Li Yunmu’s heart began to ache. He felt as if his heart was being torn and his lungs crushed from the overwhelming sense of helplessness.

“Don’t tell me… there is really no other way?” he asked in his heart.

After a moment of silence, the system said, [There is, but the price is very high.]

“What price?”

System took a deep breath. [If the ancient secret method and Great Devouring Technique are merged, Yuan Biyao’s spirit will dissipate. If you’ll want to congeal her spirit again, you will have to sacrifice half your cultivation.]

Half his cultivation!

Even if Li Yunmu had to lose his entire cultivation for Yuan Biyao, he would still be willing. If worse came to worst, he would just begin from the start.

Without the system, he would be a complete garbage anyway. If it was for Yuan Biyao, he would be willing!

“Doesn’t matter how much of my cultivation is sacrificed, I’m still willing to sacrifice myself for her,” Li Yunmu said after some thought.

[Why are you unable to let go of those emotions? If you think about it clearly, after sacrificing half the cultivation, you will return to being a mortal. You may even fall below sage flux expert realm!]

“I have already decided. No one can change my decision.”

Yuan Biyao didn’t know what the man intended to sacrifice for her, and she also didn’t know that Li Yunmu actually wanted to exploit her identity as the ancient secret method to save his world.

At the center of Ancient World, Li Yunmu opened the heavenly bridge, and a ray of white light instantly enveloped both of them.

When they entered the heavenly bridge, Li Yunmu was required to pay a large amount of dimensional stones.

“Master! You came! Which plane do you intend to go?”

Upon seeing Li Yunmu with a woman, Lu Zhong didn’t ask much and directly got to the point.

“Return me to my home world,” he calmly said.

“Okay! Master!”

After Li Yunmu’s command, the three servants began to operate the heavenly bridge platform.

chapters.title: Chapter 742 - Getting Closer
chapters.body:
Chapter 742 - Getting Closer

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

In the Land of Ice, the Eight and Heavenly Gods Council were scheming to enter Asgard. In Shiva’s eyes, capturing Scandinavia would be extremely easy with Athena acting as a mole.

Right then, he was discussing with the other gods of the Eight about how to attack Heavenly Gods Council once Scandinavia fell.

Zeus didn’t know what Shiva was thinking, but he had been dissuaded from his plans by his daughter. Once he remembered that Shiva wanted to dip his fingers into the eastern domain, he immediately realized that he was extremely greedy. Once Scandinavia was wiped out, Shiva definitely wouldn’t let things stop at that.

Right then, Scandinavia dispatched numerous gods to meet the enemy in the battlefield, but in truth, the Scandinavian God Council had come to cooperate with the Heavenly Gods Council.

Athena slowly followed after the forces.

God Shiva knew that it was the perfect opportunity, but he didn’t attack. He wanted to wait until Zeus couldn’t bear it anymore and attacked. Then, when both Asgard and Olympus were busy fighting, Shiva would eliminate both sides in one fell swoop.

The last time they had fought, the losses had been disastrous, so di Zeus really think that Shiva would sincerely cooperate with him? He was truly stupid if he did.

But since Athena had come out with the enemy, the plan Zeus had mentioned had to have succeeded.

Zeus sneered at Odin. “Today is the day you die! Daughter, what the hell are you doing? Why aren’t you attacking?”

Once Zeus gave this command, Shiva rejoiced in his heart. Scandinavia should be finished!

But before he could react, the numerous gods behind Athena quickly surrounded the forces of the Eight without letting a single person escape

When Zeus’ Heavenly Gods Council cut off the Eight’s path of retreat to, Shiva was overwhelmed with shock. What exactly was happening? Zeus couldn’t be thinking…

Zeus coldly smiled, then said, “Do you take me for a fool?”

God Shiva pointed at Zeus and said, “You… unexpectedly dared to trick me? I will kill you!”

“Don’t move! Did you forget how our alliance with Scandinavian God Council defeated your Eight last time? Today history will repeat itself. I wonder, are you surprised or are you shocked, Shiva?”

Shiva’s intestines turned green with regret. How could he have forgotten that Zeus was a cunning and crafty person?

At that moment, Shiva was forced into dire straits. When he was surrounded by the many gods, a hint of despair appeared in his heart.

“If thou didn’t have the intention of harming people, would you still find yourself in dire straits?” Oding asked calmly.

Zeus smiled coldly. “If it were not for my daughter promptly reminding me, I would have been completely in the dark. You wanted to reap the benefits while I and Scandinavian God Council were battling each other?”

Completely seen through?

Shiva took a deep breath. He had thought that Zeus was someone who only cared about profit and couldn’t see the big picture, and he had been right. However, he had never anticipated that Zeus’s daughter Athena would really be worthy of her title of goddess of wisdom.

Brunhilda, who was standing with her spear not far away, spoke to Zeus at that moment. “What are you waiting for? Capture the Eight!”

Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavian God Council’s sudden alliance had caught the Eight completely unprepared. Without the reinforcement of the projection of Lord Brahma, they were also much weaker compared to the last time. Because of that, Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavian God Council didn’t suffer disastrous losses when battling Eight, unlike the previous time.

Instead, it was the eight who were completely surrounded and suffered disastrous losses. Two of the ancient gods of the Eight were heavily injured.

When Shiva fled with his people from the Northern Land of Ice, he cut a sorry figure.

“Shiva, they had clearly calculated properly. Don’t tell me we should forget it?”

Shiva smiled bitterly. If they didn’t forget it, then what else could they do? The Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavia had already joined hands and it would take a long time to split them up. Moreover, any plans he had right then might not even work on the two of them.

When Shiva returned to the southern field with great difficulty, he was still unwilling to give up, but the Eight had already two injured gods. Shiva felt sad in his heart, so he rested and reorganized in the southern field without willing to come out.

The Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavian God Council had seized total victory, and Odin took the initiative to say to Zeus, “I hope that after this campaign, thou would sincerely be willing to become the friend of our country.”

Zeus sighed and said while gently caressing Athena’s hair, “I still have to thank my daughter. If not for her reminding me, perhaps I would’ve been hoodwinked by small profits. If I encounter such a problem in the future again, I will definitely enquire my daughter’s opinion and won’t take any action alone.”

The matter with Shiva made Zeus’ trust in Athena to deepen. Although there were still some differences between him and Odin, that wasn’t important with Athena acting as a mediator.

Athena had also obtained Odin and Brunhilda’s confidence. In the future, she wouldn’t be pushed aside in Scandinavia and would have her own position.

Brunhilda smiled slightly towards Athena.”Younger sister, I welcome you to continue staying in Scandinavia until Li Yunmu returns. But if you want to return to Olympus, that entirely depends upon you.”

Zeus looked at Athena and said, “Let’s go, do you want to return? Li Yunmu is not in Scandinavia, and his strength has also greatly weakened. I’ve learned this from Cangyue Sect.”

“Cangyue Sect? Who is that?”

Brunhilda and Athena were stunned. They had never heard of such an organization existing in the Origin World!

Zeus turned silent for a moment, then said, “It is a newly established intelligence organization. Their informants are in the territory of almost every power.”

“Previously there was an organization called Underworld Serpent, what happened to it? Could it be that Cangyue Sect replaced it?”

Zeus shook his head. “I don’t have much understanding of those matters. The information of Li Yunmu’s strength weakening has been spread by Cangyue Sect. Right now, all of the Origin World’s intelligence network is under their control.

“I heard that they were people from the sixty-six parallel planes. They came to the Origin World to avoid being exterminated and slowly formed their organization.”

Hearing Zeus’ words, Odin, Brunhilda and Athena were greatly enlightened.

“Daughter, then I will return! Olympus needs me, and if not for you, our Heavenly Gods Council and Scandinavian God Council would’ve been finished this time! I know what I did was wrong, but next time father won’t make such a mistake and will definitely listen to you,” Zeus swore.

Athena shook her head though. “Father I am sorry, I cannot return with you.”

chapters.title: Chapter 758 - Warning
chapters.body:
Chapter 758 - Warning

Chapter 758: Warning

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

Li Yunmu hesitated for a moment. The threat posed by Fuxi and Nuwa was far larger compared to some Priest Spirit Void!

Thinking of that, he nodded and said, “That’s good! Then we will go and meet Fuxi and Nuwa. But I have to say one thing, I won’t give the devil punishing sword to them!”

Yuan Biyao nodded. “I know! The devil punishing sword has already recognized a master, so they will not make things difficult for you!”

“But what about Ling Youren? She has the presence of a devil on her, which Fuxi and Nuwa will sense easily!”

Ling Youren smiled and said, “Don’t forget that I can change my attribute! So you don’t need to be anxious about me!”

Yuan Biyao and Li Yunmu were slightly startled by her words. Right after, she used some technique to remove the presence of a devil from her body without the least bit of it leaking out.

The ancient secret method certainly had some abnormal abilities.

While holding the hands of both ancient secret methods, Li Yunmu entered the Primordial God World.

The next moment, they noticed an enchantment around the Primordial God World. It had appeared after it lost the protection of Yuan Biyao.

“What happened here?”

“Seems like Fuxi and Nuwa have been vigilant toward us for a long time. Since they are being like this, why do we need to bitterly struggle here? Let’s go, since they are being heartless toward us, we don’t need to loyal toward them.”

Ling Youren looked suspiciously at Li Yumu. While blinking, she asked naively, “Why aren’t they willing to accept us? Don’t they like us?”

Li Yunmu gently caressed Ling Youren’s hair and calmly laughed, “There are many things in the world that are strange. You just have to get used to it.”

Ling Youren nodded as if she understood it. Then, while still thinking about his words, she heard Yuan Biyao shout loudly in the direction of the Primordial God World.

“Emperor Fuxi, Empress Nuwa, Biyao has come to meet you! I hope that for the sake of our past relationship of so many years, you can let us enter.”

Yuan Biyao’s words were effective, and the enchantment slowly opened.

“Fuxi and Nuwa are still willing to see us, quickly come, Li Yunmu!” she said excitedly.

She knew that Li Yunmu was the key. Only after making Fuxi and Nuwa believe in him would her heart relax.

Fuxi and Nuwa looked at each other. They could not believe that the devil presence around Li Yunmu had actually dissipated!

“Didn’t he… fall to the devil path? Why doesn’t he have the least bit of the presence of a devil?”

Yuan Biyao promptly kneeled on the ground. “Biyao is guilty. I shouldn’t have entered the Devil God Well and worried you both.”

Fuxi and Nuwa’s gaze suddenly fell on Ling Youren. She seemed to be somewhat similar to Yuan Biyao. Could she also be a spirit of the ancient secret method?

Fuxi and Nuwa’s analysis was pretty good. But Ling Youren was not just any spirit—she was the devil spirit. Her body had been invaded by the devil presence a long time ago, however, she could adjust the presence being emitted by her body.

Fuxi and Nuwa looked at Li Yunmu and said, “Seems like we misunderstood you?”

Li Yunmu disdained to talk to them. Since the moment they wanted to get rid of him, he had understood their true nature. The two of them only cared about how to profit.

Yuan Biyao saw Li Yunmu’s indifferent attitude and promptly said in his place:

“Emperor Fuxi, Empress Nuwa, Li Yunmu crossed through the Devil World’s boundary. Presently, there isn’t the least bit of devil energy in his body, and he has also obtained the devil punishing sword! If he hadn’t obtained it, I fear that it would’ve fallen into the hands of a villain! At that time, the heaven and earth would have suffered from great chaos.”

Fuxi and Nuwa were both shocked. Devil punishing sword was a protective treasure of the Primordial God World, and Li Yunmu ha surprisingly returned with it? They had been trying to find the whereabouts of the devil punishing sword for several years, but they hadn’t even seen any traces of it.

Yuan Biyao then promptly urged Li Yunmu, “Li Yunmu, quickly take out the devil punishing sword and let Fuxi and Nuwa take a look!”

Li Yunmu was somewhat reluctant to take out the sword and calmly said, “Didn’t you not trust me in the past? Even if I helped you find the devil punishing sword, you two will definitely not believe me again, isn’t that right?”

“There has indeed been many misunderstandings between you and me,” Fuxi said. “However, the matter of the devil punishing sword is too important. I request you to take out the sword and let me have a look!”

Li Yunmu commanded it with a thought, and the devil punishing sword flew out with a ‘sou’ sound. It emitted golden light from all over its body.

If Li Yunmu had truly fallen to the devil path, then the devil punishing sword would not have let him go. Thus, not only did Fuxi and Nuwa could see the devil punishing sword, they also confirmed that Li Yunmu wasn’t wallowing in the mire of the Devil World.

“Is it possible to return this devil punishing sword to Primordial God World? This is related to the existence of this world.”

Yuan Biyao sighed at that. “I fear that it is impossible! The devil punishing sword has already recognized a master. If we forcibly keep it in the Primordial God World, it will cause a great calamity!”

“What? Recognized a master? In the past thousands of years, devil punishing sword has never recognized a master, so how could it suddenly do that? Could it be…”

Fuxi and Nuwa looked at Li Yunmu with surprised. It seemed that he was quite extraordinary.

Suddenly, another sword appeared behind Li Yunmu. It suddenly rushed forth as if it was out of control.

Fuxi and Nuwa were startled by the sight of the god slaughtering devil sword. They were more than familiar with it!

“Keep that god slaughtering sword away!”

“Fuxi, Nuwa, this is a warning for you!” Li Yunmu said. “If you two still want to live, you mustn’t suspect me again. Otherwise, I definitely won’t be polite toward you!”

Such a naked threat made Fuxi and Nuwa’s complexion turn unsightly.

But Li Yunmu’s words were also correct. They should not have suspected him like that and waited until the matter was cleared before making a decision. It would have been the most rational approach.

Li Yunmu put back the god slaughtering sword and devil punishing sword and said to Yuan Biyao, “We gave our respects to them, so we should leave now!”

“You want to leave with the devil punishing sword?”

Li Yunmu’s gaze suddenly turned ruthless and he coldly said, “Else? What will you do then?”

Fuxi sighed at his words. “You misunderstood my intention. If you leave with the devil punishing sword, it will cause a calamity in the Primordial God World. The prophecy is about to be fulfilled. It says that when the devil punishing and god slaughtering swords appear together, a war will begin between the gods and devils.”

chapters.title: Chapter 795 - The Reverence Of Gods
chapters.body:
Chapter 795 - The Reverence Of Gods

Chapter 795: The Reverence of Gods

Translator: EndlessFantasy Translation Editor: EndlessFantasy Translation

For what seemed like ages, Li Yunmu stood in front of the villagers with his eyes closed as if going through a mental journey.

The villagers looked at him with hearts filled with curiosity as to why he had gathered them in the open space. Among them, one villager, who was standing behind village chief, stretched his head slightly forward.

“Village chief, you say, why exactly do you think lord god has gathered us here? If he has some instructions, then why hasn’t he said anything for so long?” he asked in a whisper.

The village chief glanced at the villager. His eyelids dropped and he calmly said, “Don’t ask what you shouldn’t ask. Lord god asked us to stand here so we are standing here.”

Before his words could fade away, the villager pulled back his head and began to wait calmly for Li Yunmu to speak.

Li Yunmu opened his eyes and looked at the villager in the front while the system roared in his brain.

[Youngster, you definitely cannot do this! Do you even know what you are doing? Mortals revering gods has been fixed from the time this universe was born and hasn’t been changed until now. If you really do this, then the entire world will be thrown into chaos.]

“Yes, that’s exactly what I want to see. Moreover, don’t tell me that when you were the True God, you didn’t try to make some changes? For example… this power of belief.”

The system was left speechless by Li Yunmu’s words.

Li Yunmu didn’t continue talking to it and returned his focus upon the villagers in front of him. After experiencing the massacre, only a few strong men were still alive. The majority of them were either old, weak, women, or children.

Without saying anything, Li Yunmu stretched his hand out and waved. His shadow under the sun turned into a mass of black mist, which was constantly twisting around, and stretched across the flat ground toward the villagers, where it stopped and slowly floated above the ground. Then, it transformed into a 1.85 m blonde muscular man.

The body of the man formed from the black mist had the most optimal constitution and was filled with muscles. A formidable pressure burst forth from him, and a strong gale caused all the dust to fly around.

The villagers standing in the front had to squint because of the wind and dust in the air.

After the breeze passed, the villagers opened their eyes and looked at the blonde man standing one meter away from them in stupefaction. Once the initial surprise passed though, the village chief in the front bent his knee and knelt on the ground.

“Greetings to lord god,” he said respectfully.

The dumbfounded villagers behind him also followed and knelt on the ground.

Chen Xiu, who was still kneeling on the ground, raised his head, and the face at the back of his head revealed a hint of helplessness. Another ancient god had appeared at some point in time.

Li Yunmu looked at the respectful villagers and said with a hint of a sneer, “You don’t need to kneel in front of him, only treat him as the main culprit behind yesterday’s massacre. Do whatever you want to him.”

When the villagers heard this, they raised their heads and began to look at each other. A long time passed, but no one dared to stand up and do anything to the blonde god. Since ancient times, the seed of reverence toward the gods had taken root in their hearts.

The village chief was terrified and said while kowtowing toward Li Yunmu, “Lord god, did we do anything wrong? If we did anything wrong, then we beg for your forgiveness. Please don’t punish us.”

[Youngster, I said this was the regulation which cannot be reversed. But unfortunately, you didn’t believe me. Now though, you should be convinced. ]

The system began to laugh maniacally after saying that.

Li Yunmu coldly snorted and looked at the villagers who were like rotten wood on which nothing could be carved and said in an ice-cold tone, “I am allowing you to do whatever you want. From now on, don’t treat this blonde man in front of you as a god.

“Instead, consider him as the main culprit behind the massacre of your relatives yesterday. Whether you want to kill him or beat him, you can do as you wish.”

After hearing his words, the village chief was even more frightened and didn’t dare to make any movements. But a few children standing in the last row quietly struggled free of their mothers’ hands. They picked up small rocks from the ground and threw them at the front.

“Hit and kill this villain!”

“I will kill you, evil person!”

One after another, small rocks thrown by the children hit the body of the blonde god.

Upon seeing this, the villagers became alarmed and grabbed the hands of the children, furiously scolding them. But the villagers could only control the actions of the children and not change the trajectory of the stones already in the air.

Those stones hit the body of the blonde god before falling to the ground. Yet the blonde god remained expressionless and did not move in the slightest.

The villagers were about to kneel on the ground and beg for forgiveness when they saw that there was no reaction from the blonde god and they suddenly recalled Li Yunmu’s words. After a period of silence, some of the young men of the village clenched their fists and struck the blonde god.

One after another, punches rained down and strands of black mist were emitted by the blonde god’s body.

After seeing this, the rest of the villagers also rushed over to attack the blonde god. Among them, some women and children even brought eggs and food from the wooden houses.

Li Yunmu stood on the side, watching the red-eyed villagers who clearly held great resentment in their hearts. Originally, they were filled with great reverence, but under his step-by-step guidance, they were finally able to remove the shackles on their hearts and do what they wanted to do.

“What now? Like I said, power of belief can be eliminated completely,” Li Yunmu said with a smile in his mind.

[You think that doing this will eliminate the reverence in the hearts of mortals? The reason why these villagers are able to kill this god is entirely because he isn’t resisting. If a genuine god was here, he would have killed all of them instantly. Therefore, your method doesn’t prove anything,] the system said with a dull tone.

“It is impossible to completely eradicate a deep-rooted thought in a short time. I am not an idiot and naturally know this. But at this instant, I have already buried an additional seed in the hearts of these villagers. It is the seed of murdering gods.

“After the gods were created by you, they have been set up high and their position had never changed. Unless they experience an accident in battle, a god can virtually live for an eternity. All while the mortals below them are born and grow old without any opportunity to change their fate.

“Apart from me whose an exception, which of the mortals can become a god? No one, there is no one. You know what I want to say, the gods have existed for too long and have already become an obstruction in the development of the world.

“Let alone me, you yourself also think so. You created the gods, but discovered that they were fixated in their ancient thinking, without any motive to move forward.

“Therefore, you created the power of belief and used it to make the gods advance by another step, turning them into ancient gods and then into master gods. After that, you allowed the master gods to use the power of belief to become the True God. But when some time passed, you grew fearful and prohibited the gods from using the power of belief to raise their cultivation.”

After saying his hypothesis, Li Yunmu calmly waited for the system’s reply.
